summary: Added duplicate question-image and mark-scheme-image path mapping detection to the current output-integrity audit.

files_changed.why: Collected unique per-record image path mappings, reported cross-record duplicate question and mark-scheme image paths, and exposed counts/check status.
Added a targeted regression test proving two distinct records sharing question and mark-scheme image paths fail integrity.

test_results: Initial targeted pytest run failed as expected because duplicate path mappings were not checked.
Final targeted pytest run passed: 12 passed.
Live output-integrity audit exited 1 due to the existing 31 suspicious dimension candidates; duplicate image path mapping counts were all zero.
repo_hygiene_notes: No generated canonical output was rewritten.
The live audit report was written under this run's iteration folder.
known_risks: A legitimate shared rendered image would now require explicit review instead of passing silently.
Exact duplicate files at different paths remain covered by storage_audit rather than this path-mapping check.
